creator: legatvs@gmail.com
text:
OK. Additional change to the original patch:

diff --git a/pkg-plist b/pkg-plist
--- a/pkg-plist
+++ b/pkg-plist
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ bin/clive
 %%SITE_PERL%%/clive/Host/Clipfish.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/clive/Host/Funnyhub.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/clive/Host/Myubo.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/clive/Host/Buzzhumor.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/clive/Progress/Bar.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/clive/Exec.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/clive/Util.pm

Thanks.
